unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Then they decided to make a paper spaceship together.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合词：太空(space)里的船(ship)就是宇宙飞船。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It was a book about space travel.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合词：在太空(space)进行的旅行(travel)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In 2003, it took a Chinese taikonaut into space for the first time.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 源自汉语拼音「太空」(taikong)，专指中国航天员。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It took the national flag of China and some seeds too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合词：代表国家的(national)旗帜(flag)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It took the national flag of China and some seeds too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：在泥土里待着的(seed)就是种子。
组合词：出生(birth)的那天(day)就是生日。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Simon's mum bought him a present too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：陪送(present)礼物的过程很开心。
分段记忆：yes (是) + ter (特) + day (天) -> 是特别的一天。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Daming is very interested in space travel.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：因特瑞斯体得(interested)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Then they decided to make a paper spaceship together.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：底塞得(decide)，心里底定，塞得满满的决定。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Daming and Simon finished the book.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：费尼实(finish)，费了力气终于搞实了，完成了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Then they decided to make a paper spaceship together.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拆分记忆：to (去) + get (得到) + her (她) -> 两个去见她，大家在一起。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The earth goes around the sun.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拆分记忆：a + round (圆) -> 绕着圆转。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What did you buy on the earth?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：人类出生(birth)在地球(earth)上。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Daming and Simon made a model of a Chinese spaceship.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：猫兜(model)，模型装在猫兜里。
